untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit trendline detection and parallel channel construction, which are not available as predefined indicators. Trendlines require dynamic slope calculation and price-to-line distance measurements not supported by the allowed indicator set. A trendline-based strategy cannot be accurately translated without custom trendline/channel indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using moving average crossovers as a proxy for trendline crosses (downward trendline ≈ shorter MA, upward trendline ≈ longer MA), but this does NOT capture the true intent of the original signal which relies on geometric trendline construction. For accurate implementation, custom trendline indicators must be added to the engine.
